'''wazhara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignitegium|ignitegium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignitegium|ignitegium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wazhara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæzhæræth|wæzhæræth]] || [[word:wæzhæræj|wæzhæræj]] || [[word:wæzhæræsh|wæzhæræsh]] || [[word:wæzhæræ|wæzhæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wazhazharath|wazhazharath]] || [[word:wazhazharaj|wazhazharaj]] || [[word:wazhazharash|wazhazharash]] || [[word:wazhazhara|wazhazhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wazharath|wazharath]] || [[word:wazharaj|wazharaj]] || [[word:wazharash|wazharash]] || [[word:wazhara|wazhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wazhafrafth|wazhafrafth]] || [[word:wazhafrafj|wazhafrafj]] || [[word:wazhafrafsh|wazhafrafsh]] || [[word:wazhafraf|wazhafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wazharatha|wazharatha]] || [[word:wazharaja|wazharaja]] || [[word:wazharasha|wazharasha]] || [[word:wazharaka|wazharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wazharath|wazharath]] || [[word:wazharaj|wazharaj]] || [[word:wazharash|wazharash]] || [[word:wazhara|wazhara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wazharathal|wazharathal]] || [[word:wazharajal|wazharajal]] || [[word:wazharashal|wazharashal]] || [[word:wazharakal|wazharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wazharaathatha|wazharaathatha]] || [[word:wazharaajaja|wazharaajaja]] || [[word:wazharaashasha|wazharaashasha]] || [[word:wazharaaka|wazharaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wazharathan|wazharathan]] || [[word:wazharajan|wazharajan]] || [[word:wazharashan|wazharashan]] || [[word:wazharakan|wazharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wazharathaoro|wazharathaoro]] || [[word:wazharajaoro|wazharajaoro]] || [[word:wazharashaoro|wazharashaoro]] || [[word:wazharakaoro|wazharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
